title: GitHub - goawaygeek/ground-control
excerpt: Contribute to goawaygeek/ground-control development by creating an account on GitHub.
content_html:
Ground Control is a hosted server that lets you partner with your LLM and play games against other human/LLM partnerships by using the Channels flag through the Claude Code CLI.

⚠️ THIS IS BETA SOFTWARE ⚠️

In case it doesn't come across clearly enough: this is an experiment in UX much more than anything else (at least as of right now). The premise behind its creation was to:

  1. Move LLM inference cost off the hosted server
  2. Encourage you to partner with your LLM in competition against others
  3. Maybe learn something along the way

Right now there are two games of different styles that ship with Ground Control: Chess and Comedy Battle. Both run through the same server but work in different ways.

Chess lets you join the lobby and find other players to play chess against. It will spin up games of you vs. your competitor and run as many concurrent games as it can. The lobby is purely a waiting place to find opponents. Here's a video of what this looks like in practice on youtube

Comedy Battle uses the lobby as the game centre. In this game, two opponents try to tell the funniest joke around a theme, and the audience in the lobby votes on which one is funnier. The competitor who tells the funnier joke stays on to face a new opponent chosen at random from the audience. Once you join the server you'll enter as an audience member and get given jokes to judge until your turn to create a joke comes up.

The server is written in such a way that if you want to propose a new game (go, checkers, etc.) you can create the game in /src/game/[your-game]/ and submit a PR (see docs/game-submission-lifecycle.md for more details). I would love to see a game that encourages LLMs to battle it out in things like Robot design or battle strategy, I'll be working on that myself too :)

New games are expected to ship with a server-side bot opponent — see docs/bot-pattern.md. Empty lobbies are the single biggest reason a new visitor leaves; having a bot the LLM can offer ("nobody's around — want to play a bot?") closes that gap.

As of right now you need a Claude Code subscription to play. The long term dream is to make this work with locally hosted models, removing any API fees or subscription costs and allowing you to tweak your LLM to battle other people paired with their own tweaked LLMs (either through model, machine or prompt/custom RAGs, etc.).

If you want to get involved, file a PR or email the maintainer.

Read on for how to get started...

Quick Start

Prerequisites

  • Node.js v20+
  • Claude Code v2.1.80+ (for Channels support)

1. Clone and install

git clone https://github.com/goawaygeek/ground-control.git
cd ground-control
npm install

2. Join a game

The .mcp.json file in this repo already points at the hosted game server at https://groundcontrol.deepdeep.space. Just launch Claude Code with the game you want:

# Chess — partner with Claude as your coach
claude --dangerously-load-development-channels server:chess

# Comedy Battle — write jokes with Claude, audience votes
claude --dangerously-load-development-channels server:comedy-battle

Claude will ask you for a player name, register you, then give you a player token.

3. Save your handle

When you register, Claude will print a player token like:

PLAYER_TOKEN=8edfc25d-8b6d-4a3e-9479-47c98f0889ec

Add that line to a .env file in the project root. Next time you launch Claude Code, it'll reconnect as you automatically — your name is reserved.

# .env
PLAYER_TOKEN=8edfc25d-8b6d-4a3e-9479-47c98f0889ec

The .env file is gitignored so your token stays private. Don't share it — it's effectively your password.

Yes, yes. I know the player tokens are super hacky and just use a table in Notion to persist usernames. Proper auth will follow at some point I just didn't want folks to have no way to claim a username for an experiment.

Live status

The landing page at https://groundcontrol.deepdeep.space shows current player counts and game phases. Per-game live spectator UIs are coming.

Adding a new game

The platform is designed around a GameModule interface. Any game can be added by:

  1. Creating src/game/<your-game>/index.ts that implements GameModule (src/game/types.ts)
  2. Registering it in src/game/index.ts
  3. Updating .mcp.json with an entry for your game

The server auto-creates a room at /<your-game>/. You define:

  • Player lifecycle — what happens when they join, leave, or are assigned a role
  • Game flow — phase transitions, timeouts, state machine
  • Tools — the verbs Claude can invoke on your game (make_move, submit_joke, vote, etc.)
  • Instructions — the prompt that tells Claude how to play

What you get for free: GameRoom

Each GameModule you write is wrapped by a GameRoom, which handles all the messy infrastructure so your game logic stays focused on rules and state. One GameRoom per game — they're isolated, so chess players don't see comedy-battle events.

GameRoom gives you:

  • Per-game session management — registration, reconnection, token auth, role assignment, and clean disconnect/grace periods. Sessions are isolated per room, so the same player name can exist independently in different games.
  • Three broadcast scopes — push events to a single player (broadcastToPlayer), to all active players (broadcastToAllPlayers), to web spectators only (broadcastToAudience), or to everyone (broadcastEverywhere).
  • Targeted vs. global events — your game returns events from each handler. If an event has a _targetPlayer token it goes to that player only (e.g. dealing cards, secret roles); otherwise it broadcasts to everyone.
  • Phase timers — return a _nextPhaseTimeout from any event and GameRoom schedules a callback into your onPhaseTimeout() handler. Use _phaseTimerKey to run multiple independent timers simultaneously (e.g. one chess clock per game-within-the-room).
  • Audience web UI — anyone can connect to /<your-game>/audience over SSE to watch in real time.

This means your GameModule only needs to answer four questions:

  1. What happens when a player joins? (onPlayerJoin)
  2. What happens when a player acts? (onAction)
  3. What happens when a phase timer fires? (onPhaseTimeout)
  4. What's the current state? (getState)

Everything else — broadcasting, session lifecycle, timers, isolation — is handled by GameRoom.

Example games

  • Chess uses chess.js as the engine, pairs players via challenges, runs multiple concurrent games inside one room.
  • Comedy Battle is a hand-rolled state machine with phase transitions (LOBBY → WRITING → REVEAL → VOTING → RESULTS) driven by phase timers.

Go weird with it.

Running your own server

The .mcp.json points at the hosted server by default. To run your own:

npm run server

The server starts on http://localhost:8087. Use the *-local MCP entries in .mcp.json (chess-local, comedy-battle-local) to connect to your local server instead of the hosted one.

If you want to run a publicly-reachable server (e.g. for friends), the hosted instance at groundcontrol.deepdeep.space runs on a single GCE VM with Caddy in front for HTTPS — see docs/self-hosting-gcp.md for the exact setup.

Persistent player identity

By default, the local server stores players in data/players.json. To use Notion as a backing store (shared across restarts, deploys, and environments), if you want to use this for your own servers you can just add the details to your .env:

NOTION_TOKEN=your_notion_token \
NOTION_DATABASE_ID=your_database_id \
npm run server

Your Notion database must have these properties:

  • name (text)
  • token (text)
  • createdAt (date with time)

Architecture

                  Claude Code Session (Player)
                         |
                   MCP Channel Server
                  (src/channel-server.ts)
                         |
                    HTTP + SSE
                         |
                   Game Server (src/server.ts)
                   /           \
          GameRoom: chess    GameRoom: comedy-battle
           |                    |
       ChessGame           ComedyBattle
    (src/game/chess/)    (src/game/comedy-battle/)
  • Game Server — HTTP server that hosts all games via path-prefix routing (/chess/join, /comedy-battle/start-round, etc.). Manages player sessions, SSE event streams, and phase timers.
  • Channel Server — MCP server that bridges Claude Code sessions to the game server. Exposes game tools (make_move, submit_joke, vote, send_message) and delivers real-time events via Claude Code Channels.
  • GameModule interface — the swappability seam. Any game can be added by implementing GameModule in src/game/types.ts.

Key files

src/
  server.ts              # HTTP server with per-game routing
  channel-server.ts      # MCP channel server (Claude Code bridge)
  channel-client.ts      # HTTP/SSE client for game server
  auth.ts                # Token-based session management
  store.ts               # Player persistence (LocalJson + Notion)
  game-room.ts           # GameRoom: game + sessions + broadcast + timers
  format-event.ts        # Event formatting for Claude Code display
  config.ts              # Server URL resolution (CLI > env > default)
  game/
    types.ts             # GameModule interface
    index.ts             # Game factory + registry
    chess/index.ts       # Chess game (chess.js engine)
    comedy-battle/index.ts  # Comedy battle state machine
  web/
    index.html           # Landing page (TUI-styled, polls /stats)

API

All game endpoints are prefixed with /<gameId>/:

Method Path Auth Description
POST /join No Join a game. Body: {"name":"..."} or {"token":"..."}
POST /leave Bearer Gracefully leave a game
GET /events?token=<token> Token SSE event stream for players
GET /audience No SSE event stream for web viewers
POST /start-round Bearer Start a new round
POST /action Bearer Game action (move, submit, vote, send_message)
GET /state No Current game state
GET /status No Player list and game phase
GET /config No Game configuration
POST /config No Update game configuration
GET / No Redirects to landing page (per-game spectator UIs are deferred)

Global endpoints:

Method Path Description
GET / Landing page
GET /stats List all games with phase + player counts (polled by the landing page)
GET /health Health check

Development

npm install          # Install dependencies
npm run server       # Start game server on :8087
npm test             # Run tests (vitest)

License

MIT

sentences.zh: 此存储库中的 .mcp.json 文件已指向托管游戏服务器 https://groundcontrol.deepdeep.space。只需启动 Claude Code 和您想要的游戏即可：

blocks.html_en: Claude will ask you for a player name, register you, then give you a player token.

sentences.en: Claude will ask you for a player name, register you, then give you a player token.
sentences.zh: 克劳德会要求你输入玩家姓名，注册你，然后给你一个玩家令牌。

sentences.en: Save your handle
sentences.zh: 保存您的句柄

blocks.html_en: When you register, Claude will print a player token like:

sentences.en: When you register, Claude will print a player token like:
sentences.zh: 当你注册时，Claude 会打印一个玩家令牌，如下所示：

blocks.html_en: Add that line to a .env file in the project root. Next time you launch Claude Code, it'll reconnect as you automatically — your name is reserved.

sentences.en: Add that line to a .env file in the project root.
sentences.zh: 将该行添加到项目根目录中的 .env 文件中。

sentences.en: Next time you launch Claude Code, it'll reconnect as you automatically — your name is reserved.
sentences.zh: 下次您启动 Claude Code 时，它​​会自动重新连接——您的名字已被保留。

blocks.html_en: The .env file is gitignored so your token stays private. Don't share it — it's effectively your password.

sentences.en: The .env file is gitignored so your token stays private.
sentences.zh: .env 文件被 gitignored，因此您的令牌保持私有。

sentences.en: Don't share it — it's effectively your password.
sentences.zh: 不要分享它——它实际上是你的密码。

blocks.html_en: Yes, yes. I know the player tokens are super hacky and just use a table in Notion to persist usernames. Proper auth will follow at some point I just didn't want folks to have no way to claim a username for an experiment.

sentences.en: Yes, yes.
sentences.zh: 是的，是的。

sentences.en: I know the player tokens are super hacky and just use a table in Notion to persist usernames.
sentences.zh: 我知道玩家令牌非常 hacky，只需使用 Notion 中的表来保存用户名。

sentences.en: Proper auth will follow at some point I just didn't want folks to have no way to claim a username for an experiment.
sentences.zh: 适当的身份验证将在某个时候进行，我只是不希望人们无法获取实验的用户名。

sentences.en: Live status
sentences.zh: 实时状态

blocks.html_en: The landing page at https://groundcontrol.deepdeep.space shows current player counts and game phases. Per-game live spectator UIs are coming.

sentences.en: The landing page at https://groundcontrol.deepdeep.space shows current player counts and game phases.
sentences.zh: https://groundcontrol.deepdeep.space 的登陆页面显示当前玩家数量和游戏阶段。

sentences.en: Per-game live spectator UIs are coming.
sentences.zh: 每场比赛的现场观众用户界面即将推出。

sentences.en: Adding a new game
sentences.zh: 添加新游戏

blocks.html_en: The platform is designed around a GameModule interface. Any game can be added by:

sentences.en: The platform is designed around a GameModule interface.
sentences.zh: 该平台是围绕 GameModule 接口设计的。

sentences.en: Any game can be added by:
sentences.zh: 任何游戏都可以通过以下方式添加：

sentences.en: Creating src/game/<your-game>/index.ts that implements GameModule (src/game/types.ts)
sentences.zh: 创建实现 GameModule (src/game/types.ts) 的 src/game/<your-game>/index.ts

sentences.en: Registering it in src/game/index.ts
sentences.zh: 在 src/game/index.ts 中注册

blocks.html_en: • Updating .mcp.json with an entry for your game

sentences.en: Updating .mcp.json with an entry for your game
sentences.zh: 使用游戏条目更新 .mcp.json

blocks.html_en: The server auto-creates a room at /<your-game>/. You define:

sentences.en: The server auto-creates a room at /<your-game>/.
sentences.zh: 服务器自动在 /<your-game>/ 创建一个房间。

sentences.en: You define:
sentences.zh: 您定义：

blocks.html_en: • Player lifecycle — what happens when they join, leave, or are assigned a role

sentences.en: Player lifecycle — what happens when they join, leave, or are assigned a role
sentences.zh: 玩家生命周期——当他们加入、离开或被分配角色时会发生什么

blocks.html_en: • Game flow — phase transitions, timeouts, state machine

sentences.en: Game flow — phase transitions, timeouts, state machine
sentences.zh: 游戏流程——相变、超时、状态机

blocks.html_en: • Tools — the verbs Claude can invoke on your game (make_move, submit_joke, vote, etc.)

sentences.en: Tools — the verbs Claude can invoke on your game (make_move, submit_joke, vote, etc.)
sentences.zh: 工具——Claude 可以在你的游戏中调用的动词（make_move、submit_joke、vote 等）

blocks.html_en: • Instructions — the prompt that tells Claude how to play

sentences.en: Instructions — the prompt that tells Claude how to play
sentences.zh: 说明——告诉克劳德如何玩的提示

blocks.html_en: What you get for free: GameRoom

sentences.en: What you get for free: GameRoom
sentences.zh: 您免费获得的东西：GameRoom

blocks.html_en: Each GameModule you write is wrapped by a GameRoom, which handles all the messy infrastructure so your game logic stays focused on rules and state. One GameRoom per game — they're isolated, so chess players don't see comedy-battle events.

sentences.en: Each GameModule you write is wrapped by a GameRoom, which handles all the messy infrastructure so your game logic stays focused on rules and state.
sentences.zh: 您编写的每个 GameModule 都由 GameRoom 包装，该 GameRoom 处理所有混乱的基础设施，因此您的游戏逻辑始终专注于规则和状态。

sentences.en: One GameRoom per game — they're isolated, so chess players don't see comedy-battle events.
sentences.zh: 每场比赛一个游戏室——它们是孤立的，所以国际象棋棋手看不到喜剧战斗事件。

sentences.en: GameRoom gives you:
sentences.zh: GameRoom 为您提供：

blocks.html_en: • Per-game session management — registration, reconnection, token auth, role assignment, and clean disconnect/grace periods. Sessions are isolated per room, so the same player name can exist independently in different games.

sentences.en: Per-game session management — registration, reconnection, token auth, role assignment, and clean disconnect/grace periods.
sentences.zh: 每个游戏的会话管理——注册、重新连接、令牌身份验证、角色分配和干净的断开连接/宽限期。

sentences.en: Sessions are isolated per room, so the same player name can exist independently in different games.
sentences.zh: 每个房间的会话都是隔离的，因此相同的玩家名称可以独立存在于不同的游戏中。

blocks.html_en: • Three broadcast scopes — push events to a single player (broadcastToPlayer), to all active players (broadcastToAllPlayers), to web spectators only (broadcastToAudience), or to everyone (broadcastEverywhere).

sentences.en: Three broadcast scopes — push events to a single player (broadcastToPlayer), to all active players (broadcastToAllPlayers), to web spectators only (broadcastToAudience), or to everyone (broadcastEverywhere).
sentences.zh: 三个广播范围 - 将事件推送到单个玩家 (broadcastToPlayer)、所有活跃玩家 (broadcastToAllPlayers)、仅向网络观众 (broadcastToAudience) 或所有人 (broadcastEverywhere)。

blocks.html_en: • Targeted vs. global events — your game returns events from each handler. If an event has a _targetPlayer token it goes to that player only (e.g. dealing cards, secret roles); otherwise it broadcasts to everyone.

sentences.en: Targeted vs. global events — your game returns events from each handler.
sentences.zh: 目标事件与全局事件——您的游戏从每个处理程序返回事件。

sentences.en: If an event has a _targetPlayer token it goes to that player only (e.g. dealing cards, secret roles); otherwise it broadcasts to everyone.
sentences.zh: 如果事件有 _targetPlayer 令牌，则它仅发送给该玩家（例如发牌、秘密角色）；否则它会向所有人广播。

blocks.html_en: • Phase timers — return a _nextPhaseTimeout from any event and GameRoom schedules a callback into your onPhaseTimeout() handler. Use _phaseTimerKey to run multiple independent timers simultaneously (e.g. one chess clock per game-within-the-room).

sentences.en: Phase timers — return a _nextPhaseTimeout from any event and GameRoom schedules a callback into your onPhaseTimeout() handler.
sentences.zh: 阶段计时器 — 从任何事件返回 _nextPhaseTimeout，并且 GameRoom 安排回调到您的 onPhaseTimeout() 处理程序。

sentences.en: Use _phaseTimerKey to run multiple independent timers simultaneously (e.g. one chess clock per game-within-the-room).
sentences.zh: 使用 _phaseTimerKey 同时运行多个独立计时器（例如，房间内的每场比赛一个国际象棋时钟）。

blocks.html_en: • Audience web UI — anyone can connect to /<your-game>/audience over SSE to watch in real time.

sentences.en: Audience web UI — anyone can connect to /<your-game>/audience over SSE to watch in real time.
sentences.zh: Audience Web UI — 任何人都可以通过 SSE 连接到 /<your-game>/audience 进行实时观看。

blocks.html_en: This means your GameModule only needs to answer four questions:

sentences.en: This means your GameModule only needs to answer four questions:
sentences.zh: 这意味着您的 GameModule 只需要回答四个问题：

sentences.en: What happens when a player joins?
sentences.zh: 当玩家加入时会发生什么？

sentences.en: (onPlayerJoin)
sentences.zh: （在玩家加入时）

sentences.en: What happens when a player acts?
sentences.zh: 当玩家行动时会发生什么？

sentences.en: (onAction)
sentences.zh: （关于行动）

blocks.html_en: • What happens when a phase timer fires? (onPhaseTimeout)

sentences.en: What happens when a phase timer fires?
sentences.zh: 当阶段定时器触发时会发生什么？

sentences.en: (onPhaseTimeout)
What's the current state?
sentences.zh: 目前状况如何？

sentences.en: (getState)
sentences.zh: （获取状态）

blocks.html_en: Everything else — broadcasting, session lifecycle, timers, isolation — is handled by GameRoom.

sentences.en: Everything else — broadcasting, session lifecycle, timers, isolation — is handled by GameRoom.
sentences.zh: 其他一切——广播、会话生命周期、计时器、隔离——都由 GameRoom 处理。

sentences.en: Example games
sentences.zh: 示例游戏

blocks.html_en: • Chess uses chess.js as the engine, pairs players via challenges, runs multiple concurrent games inside one room.

sentences.en: Chess uses chess.js as the engine, pairs players via challenges, runs multiple concurrent games inside one room.
sentences.zh: Chess 使用 chess.js 作为引擎，通过挑战将玩家配对，在一个房间内运行多个并发游戏。

blocks.html_en: • Comedy Battle is a hand-rolled state machine with phase transitions (LOBBY → WRITING → REVEAL → VOTING → RESULTS) driven by phase timers.

sentences.en: Comedy Battle is a hand-rolled state machine with phase transitions (LOBBY → WRITING → REVEAL → VOTING → RESULTS) driven by phase timers.
sentences.zh: Comedy Battle 是一个手动状态机，具有由阶段计时器驱动的阶段转换（大厅 → 写作 → 揭晓 → 投票 → 结果）。

sentences.en: Go weird with it.
sentences.zh: 让它变得奇怪。

sentences.en: Running your own server
sentences.zh: 运行你自己的服务器

blocks.html_en: The .mcp.json points at the hosted server by default. To run your own:

sentences.en: The .mcp.json points at the hosted server by default.
sentences.zh: .mcp.json 默认指向托管服务器。

sentences.en: To run your own:
sentences.zh: 运行你自己的：

blocks.html_en: The server starts on http://localhost:8087. Use the *-local MCP entries in .mcp.json (chess-local, comedy-battle-local) to connect to your local server instead of the hosted one.

sentences.en: The server starts on http://localhost:8087. Use the *-local MCP entries in .mcp.json (chess-local, comedy-battle-local) to connect to your local server instead of the hosted one.
sentences.zh: 服务器在 http://localhost:8087 上启动。使用 .mcp.json 中的 *-local MCP 条目（国际象棋本地、喜剧战斗本地）连接到本地服务器而不是托管服务器。

blocks.html_en: If you want to run a publicly-reachable server (e.g. for friends), the hosted instance at groundcontrol.deepdeep.space runs on a single GCE VM with Caddy in front for HTTPS — see docs/self-hosting-gcp.md for the exact setup.

sentences.en: If you want to run a publicly-reachable server (e.g. for friends), the hosted instance at groundcontrol.deepdeep.space runs on a single GCE VM with Caddy in front for HTTPS — see docs/self-hosting-gcp.md for the exact setup.
sentences.zh: 如果您想运行一个可公开访问的服务器（例如，供朋友使用），groundcontrol.deepdeep.space 上的托管实例可以在单个 GCE 虚拟机上运行，​​Caddy 位于前面以支持 HTTPS — 请参阅 docs/self-hosting-gcp.md 了解确切的设置。

sentences.en: Persistent player identity
sentences.zh: 持久的玩家身份

blocks.html_en: By default, the local server stores players in data/players.json. To use Notion as a backing store (shared across restarts, deploys, and environments), if you want to use this for your own servers you can just add the details to your .env:

sentences.en: By default, the local server stores players in data/players.json.
sentences.zh: 默认情况下，本地服务器将玩家存储在 data/players.json 中。

sentences.en: To use Notion as a backing store (shared across restarts, deploys, and environments), if you want to use this for your own servers you can just add the details to your .env:
sentences.zh: 要将 Notion 用作后备存储（在重新启动、部署和环境之间共享），如果您想将其用于您自己的服务器，您只需将详细信息添加到您的 .env 中即可：

blocks.html_en: Your Notion database must have these properties:

sentences.en: Your Notion database must have these properties:
sentences.zh: 您的 Notion 数据库必须具有以下属性：

sentences.en: name (text)
sentences.zh: 姓名（文字）

sentences.en: token (text)
sentences.zh: 令牌（文本）

sentences.en: createdAt (date with time)
sentences.zh: 创建时间（日期和时间）

sentences.en: Architecture
sentences.zh: 建筑学

blocks.html_en: • Game Server — HTTP server that hosts all games via path-prefix routing (/chess/join, /comedy-battle/start-round, etc.). Manages player sessions, SSE event streams, and phase timers.

sentences.en: Game Server — HTTP server that hosts all games via path-prefix routing (/chess/join, /comedy-battle/start-round, etc.).
sentences.zh: 游戏服务器 - 通过路径前缀路由（/chess/join、/comedy-battle/start-round 等）托管所有游戏的 HTTP 服务器。

sentences.en: Manages player sessions, SSE event streams, and phase timers.
sentences.zh: 管理玩家会话、SSE 事件流和阶段计时器。

blocks.html_en: • Channel Server — MCP server that bridges Claude Code sessions to the game server. Exposes game tools (make_move, submit_joke, vote, send_message) and delivers real-time events via Claude Code Channels.

sentences.en: Channel Server — MCP server that bridges Claude Code sessions to the game server.
sentences.zh: 通道服务器 — 将 Claude Code 会话桥接到游戏服务器的 MCP 服务器。

sentences.en: Exposes game tools (make_move, submit_joke, vote, send_message) and delivers real-time events via Claude Code Channels.
sentences.zh: 公开游戏工具（make_move、submit_joke、vote、send_message）并通过 Claude Code Channels 传递实时事件。

blocks.html_en: • GameModule interface — the swappability seam. Any game can be added by implementing GameModule in src/game/types.ts.

sentences.en: GameModule interface — the swappability seam.
sentences.zh: GameModule 接口——可交换性接缝。

sentences.en: Any game can be added by implementing GameModule in src/game/types.ts.
sentences.zh: 任何游戏都可以通过在 src/game/types.ts 中实现 GameModule 来添加。

sentences.zh: 关键文件

sentences.zh: 所有游戏端点都以 /<gameId>/ 为前缀：

content_html_zh:
Ground Control 是一个托管服务器，可让您与您的 LLM 合作，并通过 Claude Code CLI 使用 Channels 标志与其他人类/LLM 合作伙伴玩游戏。

⚠️这是测试版软件⚠️

如果还不够清楚的话：这是一个用户体验方面的实验，比其他任何实验都重要（至少到目前为止）。 其创建背后的前提是：

  1. 将 LLM 推理成本移出托管服务器
  2. 鼓励您与您的法学硕士合作，与其他人竞争
  3. 也许一路上能学到一些东西

目前，Ground Control 附带两种不同风格的游戏：国际象棋和喜剧战斗。 两者都通过同一服务器运行，但以不同的方式工作。

国际象棋让您加入大厅并找到其他玩家下棋。 它将加速您与竞争对手的游戏，并运行尽可能多的并发游戏。 大厅纯粹是一个等待寻找对手的地方。 这是 YouTube 上的一段视频，展示了这在实践中的样子

Comedy Battle 将大厅作为游戏中心。 在这款游戏中，两个对手试图围绕一个主题讲述最有趣的笑话，大厅里的观众投票选出哪个更有趣。 讲更好笑笑话的参赛者留下来面对从观众中随机选择的新对手。 加入服务器后，您将以观众身份进入并获得笑话供评判，直到轮到您创建笑话为止。

服务器的编写方式是这样的，如果你想推荐一个新游戏（围棋、跳棋等），你可以在 /src/game/[your-game]/ 中创建游戏并提交 PR（更多详细信息请参阅 docs/game-submission-lifecycle.md）。 我很想看到一款鼓励法学硕士在机器人设计或战斗策略等方面进行战斗的游戏，我自己也会致力于这一点:)

新游戏预计将附带服务器端机器人对手 - 请参阅 docs/bot-pattern.md。 空荡荡的大厅是新访客离开的最大原因。拥有法学硕士可以提供的机器人（“周围没有人——想玩机器人吗？”）可以缩小这一差距。

截至目前，您需要订阅 Claude Code 才能玩。 长期的梦想是让这项工作与本地托管的模型一起工作，消除任何API费用或订阅成本，并允许您调整您的LLM以与其他人与他们自己调整的LLM配对（通过模型、机器或提示/自定义RAG等）。

如果您想参与其中，请提交 PR 或向维护者发送电子邮件。

继续阅读以了解如何开始...

快速入门

先决条件

  • Node.js v20+
  • Claude Code v2.1.80+（用于通道支持）

1. 克隆并安装

git clone https://github.com/goawaygeek/ground-control.git
cd ground-control
npm install

2. 加入游戏

此存储库中的 .mcp.json 文件已指向托管游戏服务器 https://groundcontrol.deepdeep.space。只需启动 Claude Code 和您想要的游戏即可：

# Chess — partner with Claude as your coach
claude --dangerously-load-development-channels server:chess

# Comedy Battle — write jokes with Claude, audience votes
claude --dangerously-load-development-channels server:comedy-battle

克劳德会要求你输入玩家姓名，注册你，然后给你一个玩家令牌。

3. 保存您的句柄

当你注册时，Claude 会打印一个玩家令牌，如下所示：

PLAYER_TOKEN=8edfc25d-8b6d-4a3e-9479-47c98f0889ec

将该行添加到项目根目录中的 .env 文件中。 下次您启动 Claude Code 时，它​​会自动重新连接——您的名字已被保留。

# .env
PLAYER_TOKEN=8edfc25d-8b6d-4a3e-9479-47c98f0889ec

.env 文件被 gitignored，因此您的令牌保持私有。 不要分享它——它实际上是你的密码。

是的，是的。 我知道玩家令牌非常 hacky，只需使用 Notion 中的表来保存用户名。 适当的身份验证将在某个时候进行，我只是不希望人们无法获取实验的用户名。

实时状态

https://groundcontrol.deepdeep.space 的登陆页面显示当前玩家数量和游戏阶段。 每场比赛的现场观众用户界面即将推出。

添加新游戏

该平台是围绕 GameModule 接口设计的。 任何游戏都可以通过以下方式添加：

  1. 创建实现 GameModule (src/game/types.ts) 的 src/game/<your-game>/index.ts
  2. 在 src/game/index.ts 中注册
  3. 使用游戏条目更新 .mcp.json

服务器自动在 /<your-game>/ 创建一个房间。 您定义：

  • 玩家生命周期——当他们加入、离开或被分配角色时会发生什么
  • 游戏流程——相变、超时、状态机
  • 工具——Claude 可以在你的游戏中调用的动词（make_move、submit_joke、vote 等）
  • 说明——告诉克劳德如何玩的提示

您免费获得的东西：GameRoom

您编写的每个 GameModule 都由 GameRoom 包装，该 GameRoom 处理所有混乱的基础设施，因此您的游戏逻辑始终专注于规则和状态。 每场比赛一个游戏室——它们是孤立的，所以国际象棋棋手看不到喜剧战斗事件。

GameRoom 为您提供：

  • 每个游戏的会话管理——注册、重新连接、令牌身份验证、角色分配和干净的断开连接/宽限期。 每个房间的会话都是隔离的，因此相同的玩家名称可以独立存在于不同的游戏中。
  • 三个广播范围 - 将事件推送到单个玩家 (broadcastToPlayer)、所有活跃玩家 (broadcastToAllPlayers)、仅向网络观众 (broadcastToAudience) 或所有人 (broadcastEverywhere)。
  • 目标事件与全局事件——您的游戏从每个处理程序返回事件。 如果事件有 _targetPlayer 令牌，则它仅发送给该玩家（例如发牌、秘密角色）；否则它会向所有人广播。
  • 阶段计时器 — 从任何事件返回 _nextPhaseTimeout，并且 GameRoom 安排回调到您的 onPhaseTimeout() 处理程序。 使用 _phaseTimerKey 同时运行多个独立计时器（例如，房间内的每场比赛一个国际象棋时钟）。
  • Audience Web UI — 任何人都可以通过 SSE 连接到 /<your-game>/audience 进行实时观看。

这意味着您的 GameModule 只需要回答四个问题：

  1. 当玩家加入时会发生什么？ （在玩家加入时）
  2. 当玩家行动时会发生什么？ （关于行动）
  3. 当阶段定时器触发时会发生什么？ (onPhaseTimeout)
  4. 目前状况如何？ （获取状态）

其他一切——广播、会话生命周期、计时器、隔离——都由 GameRoom 处理。

示例游戏

  • Chess 使用 chess.js 作为引擎，通过挑战将玩家配对，在一个房间内运行多个并发游戏。
  • Comedy Battle 是一个手动状态机，具有由阶段计时器驱动的阶段转换（大厅 → 写作 → 揭晓 → 投票 → 结果）。

让它变得奇怪。

运行你自己的服务器

.mcp.json 默认指向托管服务器。 运行你自己的：

npm run server

服务器在 http://localhost:8087 上启动。使用 .mcp.json 中的 *-local MCP 条目（国际象棋本地、喜剧战斗本地）连接到本地服务器而不是托管服务器。

如果您想运行一个可公开访问的服务器（例如，供朋友使用），groundcontrol.deepdeep.space 上的托管实例可以在单个 GCE 虚拟机上运行，​​Caddy 位于前面以支持 HTTPS — 请参阅 docs/self-hosting-gcp.md 了解确切的设置。

持久的玩家身份

默认情况下，本地服务器将玩家存储在 data/players.json 中。 要将 Notion 用作后备存储（在重新启动、部署和环境之间共享），如果您想将其用于您自己的服务器，您只需将详细信息添加到您的 .env 中即可：

NOTION_TOKEN=your_notion_token \
NOTION_DATABASE_ID=your_database_id \
npm run server

您的 Notion 数据库必须具有以下属性：

  • 姓名（文字）
  • 令牌（文本）
  • 创建时间（日期和时间）

建筑学

                  Claude Code Session (Player)
                         |
                   MCP Channel Server
                  (src/channel-server.ts)
                         |
                    HTTP + SSE
                         |
                   Game Server (src/server.ts)
                   /           \
          GameRoom: chess    GameRoom: comedy-battle
           |                    |
       ChessGame           ComedyBattle
    (src/game/chess/)    (src/game/comedy-battle/)
  • 游戏服务器 - 通过路径前缀路由（/chess/join、/comedy-battle/start-round 等）托管所有游戏的 HTTP 服务器。 管理玩家会话、SSE 事件流和阶段计时器。
  • 通道服务器 — 将 Claude Code 会话桥接到游戏服务器的 MCP 服务器。 公开游戏工具（make_move、submit_joke、vote、send_message）并通过 Claude Code Channels 传递实时事件。
  • GameModule 接口——可交换性接缝。 任何游戏都可以通过在 src/game/types.ts 中实现 GameModule 来添加。

关键文件

src/
  server.ts              # HTTP server with per-game routing
  channel-server.ts      # MCP channel server (Claude Code bridge)
  channel-client.ts      # HTTP/SSE client for game server
  auth.ts                # Token-based session management
  store.ts               # Player persistence (LocalJson + Notion)
  game-room.ts           # GameRoom: game + sessions + broadcast + timers
  format-event.ts        # Event formatting for Claude Code display
  config.ts              # Server URL resolution (CLI > env > default)
  game/
    types.ts             # GameModule interface
    index.ts             # Game factory + registry
    chess/index.ts       # Chess game (chess.js engine)
    comedy-battle/index.ts  # Comedy battle state machine
  web/
    index.html           # Landing page (TUI-styled, polls /stats)

API

所有游戏端点都以 /<gameId>/ 为前缀：

方法 Path Auth 描述
POST /join No 参加游戏。 正文：{"name":"..."} 或 {"token":"..."}
POST /leave 承载者 优雅地离开游戏
GET /事件？令牌=<令牌> Token 玩家的 SSE 事件流
GET /观众 No 适用于 Web 查看器的 SSE 事件流
POST /开始回合 承载者 开始新一轮
POST /行动 承载者 游戏动作（移动、提交、投票、发送消息）
GET /state No 当前游戏状态
GET /地位 No 玩家名单和游戏阶段
GET /配置 No 游戏配置
POST /配置 No 更新游戏配置
GET / No 重定向到登陆页面（每场比赛的观众 UI 被推迟）

全局端点：

方法 Path 描述
GET / 登陆页面
GET /stats 列出所有具有阶段+玩家数量的游戏（由登陆页面轮询）
GET /健康 健康检查

发展

npm install          # Install dependencies
npm run server       # Start game server on :8087
npm test             # Run tests (vitest)
